purpose: Local release-candidate route for public media/content exports that require C2PA asset binding before publication.

artifact_source.privacy_review: required before publication; synthetic probes must not contain host-private evidence

c2pa.claim_limit: Local c2patool validation proves asset binding and claim signature integrity; production publication still needs an accepted signing credential and privacy review.

consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: Content consumers select a public_media_export registry latest only after durable evidence promotion, media subject materialization, and a release-consumer trust-gate allow or warn verdict over C2PA asset binding, claim signature integrity, publication privacy route, source repo, and trust root mode.

consumer_command: ABYSS_MACHINE_C2PA_TRUST_ANCHORS=TRUST_ANCHORS_PEM_OR_URL c2patool MEDIA.public.png --external-manifest MEDIA.public.c2pa trust --trust_anchors TRUST_ANCHORS_PEM_OR_URL > BUNDLE_DIR/artifact.c2pa.json
For embedded credentials, omit artifact.c2pa and record c2patool MEDIA.public.jpg trust output in BUNDLE_DIR/artifact.c2pa.json.

abyss-machine artifacts evidence-promote BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state release-ready --consumer-ref abyss-machine:public-media-export --evidence-ref manual-positive:public-media-export --source-repo abyss-machine --source-ref manifests/artifact_bundles/public_media_export.bundle.json --producer abyss-machine-public-media-export --trust-root-mode public_release --trust-root-evidence-json @TRUST_ROOT_EVIDENCE_JSON --json

abyss-machine artifacts materialize-subjects BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --store-root SUBJECT_STORE_ROOT --manifest manifests/artifact_bundles/public_media_export.bundle.json --consumer-intent release_consumer --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode public_release --json

abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class public_media_export --consumer-intent release_consumer --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode public_release --subject-digest SUBJECT_DIGEST --json

abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class public_media_export --consumer-intent release_consumer --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode public_release --json
